data.raceComments: {"comment":"6. PEPPI GRATZ produced a strong effort last time out when he came from the back row and scored by 3 metres at Newcastle. That was his third win from his last five starts and he was successful the only time he raced here. 2. ANTETOKOUNMPO had to work last start so should enjoy today's draw closer to the pegs. Had kicked off the campaign with back-to-back placings and should be hitting peak fitness now. 1. EIFFEL FROM HEAVEN has been coming from the back row of late and there was merit in the latest effort for fourth. Well served by the ace draw and has recorded three wins and a placing in seven attempts at this circuit and distance. 5. TRUTHBETOLD has been about the mark of late and must be respected after recording a fourth successive placing with a 2.5m second at Narrabri on Sunday.","runners":[6,2,1,5],"exclusive":false}
